source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
    TableName,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(50), LastProcessedLSN, 1) AS LastProcessedLSN,
    IsActive
FROM dbo.CDC_Control
WHERE IsActive = 1;

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
'SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(50), LastProcessedLSN, 1) AS LastProcessedLSN 
 FROM CDC_Control 
 WHERE TableName = ''',
item().TableName,
''''
)

@concat(
'SELECT * FROM cdc.fn_cdc_get_all_changes_dbo_',
item().TableName,
'(CONVERT(binary(10), ''',
variables('v_FromLSN'),
''', 1),
CONVERT(binary(10), ''',
variables('v_GlobalMaxLSN'),
''', 1),
''all'')'
)
